title: Facebook Lead Forms integration method
detail: BRD specifies capturing leads from Facebook Lead Forms. Integration could use Facebook Webhooks (real-time) or periodic API polling. Decision deferred to implementation.
constraint_note: Must auto-create lead records without manual data entry

title: Google Forms / Ads lead capture integration
detail: BRD specifies Google Forms and Google Ads as lead sources. Integration method (Google Sheets webhook, Zapier, direct API) deferred to implementation.
constraint_note: Must funnel into the same lead record format as other sources

title: Email delivery service selection
detail: System requires transactional email for confirmations, reminders, and payment instructions. Service choice (SendGrid, SES, Resend, etc.) deferred to implementation.
constraint_note: Must support template-based emails with variable substitution

title: Calendar invite generation
detail: BRD mentions optional calendar invite on trial confirmation. Implementation method (.ics attachment vs Google Calendar link vs both) deferred.
constraint_note: Should work across major calendar apps (Google, Apple, Outlook)

title: Technology stack and hosting
detail: No technology stack specified in BRD. Framework, database, and hosting decisions deferred to implementation phase.
constraint_note: Must support the non-functional requirements (mobile-responsive, secure, scalable)
